Commons 3.0 Deed ) The TerraSwarm Kickoff meeting was held in the SwarmLab, 4th Floor, Cory Hall UC Berkeley on Tuesday, January 29, 2013. The emphasis of this meeting was on bringing the co-PI's together. Feel free to bring a senior postdoc or a

ogether. Feel free to bring a senior postdoc or a key graduate student. We asked each PI and key collaborators to prepare a brief presentation explaining what you bring to the table for TerraSwarm and what you hope to accomplish. The presentation
and what you hope to accomplish. The presentations are available, see the Agenda . Website Copyright ©
